역대상 14:1.content: Hiram king of Tyre sent messengers to David with cedar trees, masons, and carpenters, to build him a house.

역대상 14:2.content: David perceived that Yahweh had established him king over Israel; for his kingdom was exalted on high, for his people Israel’s sake.

역대상 14:3.content: David took more wives at Jerusalem, and David became the father of more sons and daughters.

역대상 14:4.content: These are the names of the children whom he had in Jerusalem: Shammua, Shobab, Nathan, Solomon,

역대상 14:8.content: When the Philistines heard that David was anointed king over all Israel, all the Philistines went up to seek David; and David heard of it, and went out against them.

역대상 14:9.content: Now the Philistines had come and made a raid in the valley of Rephaim.

역대상 14:10.content: David inquired of God, saying, “Shall I go up against the Philistines? Will you deliver them into my hand?” Yahweh said to him, “Go up; for I will deliver them into your hand.”

역대상 14:11.content: So they came up to Baal Perazim, and David defeated them there. David said, God has broken my enemies by my hand, like waters breaking out. Therefore they called the name of that place Baal Perazim.

역대상 14:12.content: They left their gods there; and David gave a command, and they were burned with fire.

역대상 14:13.content: The Philistines made a another raid in the valley.

역대상 14:14.content: David inquired again of God; and God said to him, “You shall not go up after them. Turn away from them, and come on them opposite the mulberry trees.

역대상 14:15.content: When you hear the sound of marching in the tops of the mulberry trees, then go out to battle; for God has gone out before you to strike the army of the Philistines.”

역대상 14:16.content: David did as God commanded him; and they attacked the army of the Philistines from Gibeon even to Gezer.

역대상 14:17.content: The fame of David went out into all lands; and Yahweh brought the fear of him on all nations.
